title: LinkedIn dry-run — governed path
summary: Verify linkedin.post v1: approve → execute → .md + .json receipt under JARVIS_ROOT; no live API.
uncertaintySummary: Dry-run rehearsal copy; not posted to LinkedIn; engagement and compliance not evaluated.

payload.body:
We're not shipping "autonomous posting." We're shipping governed loops: propose → approve → execute → receipt.

This line is a dry-run rehearsal in Jarvis (linkedin.post v1). Nothing hit LinkedIn's API—just proof that the exact outbound text and hash landed where operators can audit it.
